economic_notes: Band has ownership in Lilloet Salish Enterprises Ltd (50%), Antares Construction LLP (wholly owned), Antares Project Services LLP (wholly owned), BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership, and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing General Partner Inc. notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because GBE and partnership financial information was not available and not consolidated. Prior year restated to include property taxation department and reclassify Replacement Reserve Fund from equity to liability. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,711,165 + FNHA $515,918 + FNESC $15,982 + FNES $108,810 + CMHC $28,276 + Province of BC $30,000 + New Relationship Trust $11,000 = $2,421,151 minus deferred revenue current adjustment of $163,768 applied partially; used sum of identifiable government transfers before deferred revenue netting = $2,411,151. warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
